title: Classic Damage Sounds
description: This resource pack brings back the old player damage sounds from pre-Minecraft versions.
body:
# Deprecated as of 1st March 2025!


This resource pack brings back the old sound effects when the player takes damage from pre-Minecraft versions.

Actually, it's a fork from [this resource pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-classic-hurt-sounds/) after it wasn't updated after 1.18, so I thought it needs to be updated.
